- Incident 1: Iranian CyberAv3ngers intrusion into US water systems (2023) using default passwords

### GRU AI Deepfake Operation
- GRU military intelligence creates AI-generated deepfakes of influencers like Naomi Seibt
- Uses computer-generated personalities with Hollywood VFX technologies and Disney tools
- Includes fictional deaths of GRU agents, global supply-chain hackers
- Connections to Jasmin Fedder and Axel Springer
- Hybrid warfare threatening democratic institutions and international stability
- Recommended measures: International arrest warrants, asset freezes, system shutdowns
- Influencers part of global NWO campaign; in Germany NWO means "Nie wieder Online / Nazi Gangstalking Psychotic Anarchist Group"

### Prognosis for 2026
- Increase in cyberwar and cyber warfare by 2026
- Situation similar to Cold War: ongoing, unannounced, differently interpreted
- Risks of escalation leading to real conflicts
- Forensic investigations of incidents like data leaks (e.g., Frivol.com February 2026) and alternative OS experiments

### Recommendations
- Governments should warn populations and invest in cyber defense
- Individuals should be aware of threats and take personal security measures
- Project open for contributions; add new evidence in forensic German style
